diagnosis.root_cause: There may be a failure in data collection or integration processes, leading to incomplete loan amount entries.
diagnosis.business_impact: High null rates can skew analytics and reporting, leading to inaccurate loan performance assessments and flawed predictive modeling.

suggestions.rationale: Replacing null values with the median is a reliable method to maintain data distribution and reduce bias in analytics.
suggestions.caveats: This assumes that the distribution of loan amounts is not heavily skewed, which may not be true in all cases.

suggestions.rationale: Filling null values with the mean can help mitigate the impact of missing data on analytics.
suggestions.caveats: This may distort the data if there are outliers affecting the mean.

suggestions.rationale: No remediation will be applied, and this decision is recorded for auditing purposes.
suggestions.caveats: The issue with null values remains unresolved.
